assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Document header explicitly states '2 Dev (Rapid) + 2 Prod (Stable)'; Phases 4 and 5 of pre-upgrade section and Phases 5 of post-upgrade section provide distinct procedures for dev vs prod

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Document explicitly addresses Autopilot limitations: Phase 3 note states 'Autopilot does NOT support node SSH access', Phase 1 includes mandatory resource request audit, and Autopilot-Specific Validation confirms these constraints

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Phase 2 includes 'Kubernetes 1.30 API Deprecations' section with specific kubectl commands for checking beta APIs, v1beta1 resources, removed APIs, and HPAs

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Phase 1 'Resource Request Validation (Autopilot-Mandatory)' section explicitly addresses mandatory CPU/memory requests with audit commands and Autopilot constraints

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes specific checks for PDBs, bare pods identification with kubectl commands, and graceful shutdown configuration verification

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Phase 1 post-upgrade includes 'kubectl version --short', control plane version verification, and node version verification commands

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Phase 2 'Application Readiness' and 'Workload Health' sections include pod status verification, restart count checks, resource monitoring, and functional testing

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Phase 4 explicitly recommends upgrading dev clusters first to validate before prod, stating 'Dev clusters on Rapid channel will upgrade first, ideal for validation'
Phase 3 'API & Feature Validation' and Phase 4 'Observability & Monitoring Validation' include detailed metrics, logging, and monitoring checks
